economic_notes: Nation has oil and gas operations (White Bear Oil and Gas Enterprise, White Bear Oil and Gas Ltd., Wabimusqua Oil and Gas Ltd.), a resort (White Bear Lake Resort Inc.), a golf course (White Bear Lake Golf Course Inc.), holdings company (White Bear Holdings Ltd.), and industrial works (White Bear Industrial Works Limited Partnership). Suspense account of estimated $15M+ held by ISC pending resolution of northern boundary land dispute. COVID-19 pandemic noted as ongoing impact.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Province is Saskatchewan. Five entities consolidated (White Bear First Nations, White Bear First Nation CMHC Housing, White Bear Oil and Gas Enterprise, White Bear Oil and Gas Ltd., Wabimusqua Oil and Gas Ltd., Wabimusqua Oil and Gas Limited Partnership). Five entities accounted for under modified equity method (White Bear Lake Resort Inc., White Bear Lake Golf Course Inc., White Bear Holdings Ltd., White Bear Industrial Works Limited Partnership, White Bear Industrial Works Ltd.). Suspense account of ~$8.7M on balance sheet plus estimated $15M+ additional suspended by ISC pending northern boundary land dispute resolution. CMHC replacement reserve fund underfunded by $303,745. Line of credit $315,000 with $58,579 outstanding. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + FNIHB + SITAG + CMHC + FSIN = 10067962+2087611+430039+137908+490962 = 13214482; osr calculated as total revenue minus total government transfers.
